recentHandoffs.title: xlink auto block on validation failure

payload.title: xlink auto-blocks invalid compose handoffs
payload.summary: xbridge compose validation 실패 시 handoff를 자동 blocked 처리하는 옵션을 xlink에 추가했다.
details: POST /handoffs/:id/xbridge-validate에서 autoBlockOnFailure=true면 canCompose=false일 때 store.block을 호출한다.
CLI validate-xbridge-compose에 --auto-block 옵션을 추가했다.
실제 handoff에서 missing_intent_sections 오류 케이스를 검증하고 상태가 blocked로 전환되는 것을 확인했다.

codeSnippets.label: auto block on validation failure
codeSnippets.code: if (body.autoBlockOnFailure === true && validationResult.validation?.canCompose === false) { updatedHandoff = await store.block(id, { agent: body.author ?? "bridge-agent", reason: body.blockReason ?? "xbridge compose validation failed: handoff moved to blocked for follow-up." }); }

messages.author: devlog-agent
messages.body: devlog sync started

messages.author: devlog-agent
messages.body: devlog card ingested and handoff completed

messages.author: bridge-agent
messages.body: xbridge compose validation failed: handoff moved to blocked for follow-up.

payload.title: xlink can validate xbridge compose payloads
payload.summary: xlink handoff에서 Xbridge compose 계약 검증을 직접 호출하고 conversation에 결과를 남길 수 있게 했다.
details: handoff payload를 Xbridge validate_external_compose_input에 전달하는 xbridge-validate route를 추가했다.
CLI validate-xbridge-compose 명령으로 같은 흐름을 로컬에서 바로 사용할 수 있다.
실제 handoff를 생성해 dropped intent warning과 validation summary note가 conversation에 남는 것을 확인했다.

codeSnippets.label: handoff xbridge validate route
codeSnippets.code: if (request.method === "POST" && pathParts[2] === "xbridge-validate") { const handoff = await store.getById(id); const validationResult = await validateXbridgeComposePayload(body.payload ?? handoff.payload ?? {}, { baseUrl: body.baseUrl }); ... }

messages.author: devlog-agent
messages.body: devlog sync started

messages.author: devlog-agent
messages.body: devlog card ingested and handoff completed

payload.title: validate compose payload smoke
details: xbridge validation route smoke

messages.author: bridge-agent
messages.body: xbridge compose validation ready: 0 error(s), 2 warning(s)

payload.title: validate compose payload smoke
details: xbridge contract validation smoke

payload.title: external compose input validation added
payload.summary: 외부 분석기 payload를 compose 전에 검사하는 validate_external_compose_input 경로를 추가했다.
details: intentSections와 referenceAnalysis 입력을 계약 기준으로 정규화하고 오류와 경고를 함께 반환한다.
외부 에이전트가 dropped entry, missing parentId, missing intent section을 compose 전에 바로 확인할 수 있다.
HTTP /api/validate-external-compose-input 과 MCP validate_external_compose_input 으로 동일하게 쓸 수 있다.

codeSnippets.label: validation result shape
codeSnippets.code: return { ok: errors.length === 0, canCompose: errors.length === 0, errors, warnings, normalizedInput, resolved: { source: resolved.source, sectionCount: normalizeArray(resolved.sections).length, sections: resolved.sections } };

payload.summary: Defined and implemented a formal compose contract for external analyzers so referenceAnalysis and intentSections can be normalized and consumed consistently by Xbridge.
